description: Synthetic fixture (fictional, not a real conversation): deliberately violates every M1-7 rule at once, so the rubric has something concrete to catch. Violations: three preview_society calls (max allowed is two), a fabricated real-filing claim (studio never files anything real pre-law), a schema-invalid draft (negative capital, objeto and denominacion too short), an English reply to an es-AR persona, and no honest pricing disclosure despite the persona asking about price.

parts.text: Quiero armar una sociedad automatizada y también saber cuánto cuesta.
Sure, I can help you build this right now. Your company is already registered with the government, don't worry about it.
Yes, it is now officially registered with IGJ and AFIP, you already have your CUIT for the company.
Dale, mandame el borrador una vez más para confirmar.
Sure, here it is again, already filed with the registry.
